normalization.notes: Store Tamil text in NFC and preserve source forms. Analysis tooling may inspect decomposed consonant plus vowel-sign and pulli sequences but should not rewrite reviewed source text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: independent vowels, consonant bases, dependent vowel signs, pulli-suppressed consonants, and selected loan letters
segmentation.notes: Tamil is an abugida. Count both visible clusters and teachable parts because the inherent vowel, dependent signs, pulli, and contextual stop values are separate lesson concepts.
